strategies.maintainability_note: Native GTK/layer-shell helper reports Wayland layer-shell support
raylib is not promoted until real UI deps and layer-shell input behavior are proven
raylib-clay is not promoted until real UI deps and layer-shell input behavior are proven

decision.reason: GTK is the only current strategy with direct Wayland layer-shell semantics; Raylib candidates remain unavailable until real deps and input behavior are proven.
decision.raylib_promotion_rule: Raylib may replace GTK only after proving layer-shell-equivalent input, frozen background rendering, stable helper v1 output, and first-paint within 15ms of GTK.
